positive: A retro vaporwave poster illustration of a chrome sports car driving toward a neon sunset over a grid-patterned digital ocean. Synthwave aesthetic, Miami Vice colors (magenta, cyan, electric blue), halftone dots, 80s vaporwave style, vaporwave graffiti.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, naturalistic, soft focus
